title: Is there a way to link views so column changes propagate between views?
excerpt: I noticed that when I changed the position of a column in one view, the changes were not propagated to a views that was the same view but with a filter applied. Is there a way to link views so column changes propagate be…

posts.author: matts (Matt S)
posts.cookedHtml:
I noticed that when I changed the position of a column in one view, the changes were not propagated to a views that was the same view but with a filter applied. Is there a way to link views so column changes propagate between views?

I did a bit of searching for a solution on forums here but didn’t find anything.

@JCorrell

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@matts

The short answer is no. Once created, the views are, for basically everything that matters, completely independent. Probably the easiest way to deal with the example that you gave would be to recreate the view then add the filter back.

Jim - Subscribe to The Monday Man

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
